Description: The custom percent probability a deal will close.

Name: Time in current stage
Description: The time this object has spent in the current pipeline stage

Name: Weighted open pipeline in company currency
Description: Sum in company currency of open deal amount, weighted by pipeline stage

Name: First Call Offer Made?
Options: Yes (true); No (false)

Name: Refund / Chargeback Date
Description: This property marks the date a deal enters refund or chargeback deal stage.

Name: Sale Type
Description: This property is used to differentiate when someone in a brand new customer VS. when someone is a returning client OR this is a payment for a payment plan (MRR or recurring revenue)
Options: New Business; Existing Business; UpSell; Downsell

Name: Closer Owner
Usages: Rollup property (1); Automation platform flow (2); Dependent conditional field (2)

Name: Closing - No Show / Cancel Type
Options: No Show; Canceled (Us); Canceled (them); Reschedule Requested

Name: Closing Call No Showed
Options: Closing Call - No Show; Closing Call - Showed Up

Name: Closing Call Outcome
Options: Scheduled; No Show; Completed - Nurture; Canceled; DQ; F/U Scheduled; F/U Incomplete; RedZone; Won - Payment Plan; Won - PIF; Deal Lost; Refund Or Chargeback

Name: Deal Lost Reason
Options: Financial; Did not believe it was a good fit; Timing; Went with a competitor; Was shopping / not committed; Strong Objections (Couldn't get around them); Other

Name: Demo - No Show / Cancel Type
Options: No Show; Canceled (Us); Canceled (them); Reschedule Requested

Name: Disco - No Show / Cancel Type
Options: No Show; Canceled (Us); Canceled (them); Reschedule Requested

Name: Demo Call No Showed
Options: Demo Call - No Show (Disco Call - No Show); Demo Call - Showed Up (Disco Call - Showed Up)

Name: Disco Call No Showed
Options: Disco Call - No Show; Disco Call - Showed Up

Name: Demo Call Outcome
Options: Scheduled; No Show; Canceled; DQ; Qualified; Won; Lost

Name: Disco Call Outcome
Options: Scheduled; No Show; Canceled; DQ; Qualified; Won; Lost

Name: F/U - No Show / Cancel Type
Options: No Show; Canceled (Us); Canceled (them); Reschedule Requested

Name: F/U Call Outcome
Options: Scheduled; No Show; Canceled; F/U Scheduled; Completed - Nurture; RedZone; Won - Payment Plan; Won - PIF; Lost; Refund Or Chargeback

Name: Follow-Up Call No Showed
Options: F/U Call - No Show; F/U Call - Showed Up

Name: Manager Escalation
Options: Yes (true); No (false)

Name: Original Call Booked Source
Options: Setters - Strategy Call; Setter - Discovery Call; Email - Discovery Call; Ads -  Discovery Call; Ads -  Strategy Call

Name: Program / Products Purchased
Options: SkyTab Station; SkyTab Glass (Tablet); SkyTab Mobile; SkyTab 22" Kitchen Display; SpotOn 15" Station; SpotOn 10" Station; Focus Station; Alpha Onboarding - First Station

Name: Rebooked After No Show
Options: Yes (true); No (false)

Name: RedZone - Type
Options: Submitted Deposit; Verbally Committed To Moving Forward; Prospect Has invoice / contract in hand; Prospect has shown signs of closing (Follow up scheduled)

Name: Setter Owner
Description: This property identifies who is assigned to this deal as the setter and who qualified and set this closing meeting,
Usages: Rollup property (1); Automation platform flow (1); Dependent conditional field (2)
